description: Canonical CD14 promoter window centered on the primary Gencode v49 transcription start site.
source: Gencode v49 primary assembly annotation (CD14 ENSG00000170458.16); Zhang et al. J Biol Chem 1994 PMID 7512565

description: Operational Region 6 window within the validated CD14 downstream 20 kb enhancer cluster, aligned to the monocyte raw-bin H3K27ac peak and the literature's region 6-8 screening design.
source: Schmidl et al. Blood 2014 PMID 24671955; operational hg38 window spanning the validated downstream enhancer cluster

description: Operational Region 7 window within the validated CD14 downstream 20 kb enhancer cluster, aligned to the literature's region 6-8 enhancer screen and the monocyte raw-bin signal breakpoints.
source: Schmidl et al. Blood 2014 PMID 24671955; operational hg38 window spanning the validated downstream enhancer cluster

description: Operational Region 8 window within the validated CD14 downstream 20 kb enhancer cluster, aligned to the literature's region 6-8 enhancer screen and the monocyte raw-bin signal breakpoints.
source: Schmidl et al. Blood 2014 PMID 24671955; operational hg38 window spanning the validated downstream enhancer cluster
